title: Helios EDR Architecture Overview
content: The Helios EDR platform consists of a lightweight kernel-mode sensor (<1% CPU, <60MB RAM) deployed on Windows, macOS, and Linux endpoints. Sensors stream telemetry over mTLS 1.3 to the regional Helios Cloud, where a Kafka-backed streaming pipeline applies behavioral rules, YARA, and an XGBoost classifier in parallel. Detection-to-alert latency: median 8s, p95 22s, p99 41s (Q4 2023 fleet benchmark, n=2.1M endpoints). Alerts surface in the Helios Console and forward to SIEM/SOAR via webhook, syslog, or native connectors.

title: Supported Data Sources & Integrations
content: Endpoint telemetry: process creation, file/registry modification, network connections, DNS, PowerShell/WMI, kernel callbacks. Cloud: AWS CloudTrail, GuardDuty, Azure Activity Log, Defender, GCP Audit, Google Workspace. Identity: Okta, Azure AD, Ping, Duo. Network: Palo Alto, Cisco ASA/FTD, Fortinet, Zscaler. Email: M365, Google Workspace, Proofpoint. 180+ connectors total; custom sources via syslog/CEF or REST Log Forwarder API.

title: Data Residency & Encryption
content: Helios Cloud operates in four isolated regions: us-east-1 (Virginia), us-west-2 (Oregon), eu-central-1 (Frankfurt), ap-southeast-2 (Sydney). Customer telemetry, detections, and case data are pinned to the tenant's home region and never replicated cross-region. Encryption at rest: AES-256-GCM via AWS KMS; customers may supply their own KMS key (BYOK) or an external HSM (Hold-Your-Own-Key, enterprise tier). Encryption in transit: TLS 1.3 with certificate pinning agent↔cloud, TLS 1.2+ for console/API. EU tenants are GDPR-aligned with an executed DPA and SCCs.

title: Managed Detection & Response (MDR) Service Description
content: Helios MDR provides 24×7×365 monitoring by SOC analysts in Austin and Dublin (follow-the-sun). Service includes alert triage, threat hunting, guided response playbooks, and a 30-minute SLA for critical-severity human acknowledgement. Monthly threat briefings and quarterly tabletop exercises included for Enterprise tier.

title: Deployment & Agent Management
content: Agents deploy via MSI/PKG/DEB/RPM, MDM (Intune, Jamf, Kandji), or script. Signed delta auto-update with staged rollout (1% canary → 25% → 100%) and automatic rollback. Customers may pin versions and require manual approval per release ring.
